jobs.title: Production Support Engineer
jobs.requirements:
Fresher or up to 1 year of experience in Production Support, Application Support, IT Operations, or related field
Basic knowledge of SQL and database concepts
Understanding of Linux/Unix commands
Knowledge of incident management and ticketing tools (ServiceNow, Jira, Remedy, etc.) is a plus
Ability to analyze logs and troubleshoot application issues
Basic understanding of networking concepts
Familiarity with Windows and Linux operating systems
Knowledge of scripting languages such as Python, Shell Scripting, or PowerShell is a plus
Understanding of batch jobs, file transfers, and monitoring tools is preferred
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good communication and stakeholder management skills
Willingness to work in rotational shifts and provide production support
B.E./B.Tech, B.Sc, BCA, MCA, or equivalent degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field
Ability to work under pressure and meet SLA commitments
Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies and business applications
jobs.description: We are looking for a Production Support Engineer Fresher to join our IT Operations team. The candidate will be responsible for monitoring applications, troubleshooting production issues, supporting business-critical systems, and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. This role provides an excellent opportunity to learn incident management, application support, database troubleshooting, and production environment management.

jobs.title: Business Analyst
jobs.requirements:
Fresher or up to 1 year of experience in Business Analysis, Data Analysis, or related fields
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good understanding of business processes and requirement gathering
Knowledge of MS Excel, PowerPoint, and Word
Basic knowledge of SQL and databases is preferred
Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau is a plus
Understanding of SDLC, Agile, and Scrum methodologies is an advantage
Ability to create BRD, FRD, user stories, and process flow documents
Excellent verbal and written communication skills
Strong stakeholder management and coordination skills
Knowledge of Jira, Confluence, or other project management tools is preferred
Ability to analyze data and prepare reports and presentations
jobs.description: We are looking for a Business Analyst Fresher to join our team. The candidate will be responsible for gathering and analyzing business requirements, preparing documentation, coordinating with stakeholders, and supporting process improvement initiatives. This role offers an opportunity to work closely with business and technical teams to deliver effective solutions and gain hands-on experience in business analysis and project management.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.requirements:
Fresher or up to 1 year of experience in Data Analysis, Business Intelligence, or related fields
Strong knowledge of SQL and database concepts
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, Charts)
Basic knowledge of Python (Pandas, NumPy) is preferred
Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau
Understanding of statistics and data analysis techniques
Ability to clean, transform, and analyze datasets
Knowledge of ETL concepts and data pipelines is a plus
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Good communication and presentation skills
Familiarity with reporting and dashboard creation
Understanding of business metrics and KPIs
Knowledge of databases such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or SQL Server is preferred
jobs.description: We are looking for a Data Analyst Fresher to join our team. The candidate will be responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data to support business decisions. This role offers an opportunity to work with datasets, create reports and dashboards, and gain hands-on experience with data analysis tools and techniques.

walkin_drives.title: Walk in drive Production Support Engineer
walkin_drives.description:
Join our Walk-in Drive for the Production Support Engineer role.

Date: 24-06-2026
Time: 10:00 AM
Location: Mumbai

Eligibility:
• B.E./B.Tech, B.Sc, BCA, MCA, or equivalent degree.
• Freshers and candidates with up to 1 year of experience are welcome.
• Basic knowledge of SQL, Linux/Unix, Windows OS, networking, and application support is preferred.

Documents to Carry:
• Updated Resume (2 copies)
• Government Photo ID Proof
• Passport Size Photograph
• Educational Certificates and Mark Sheets

Selection Process:
1. Registration
2. HR Screening
3. Technical Interview
4. Managerial Discussion
5. Final HR Round

Candidates are requested to reach the venue 30 minutes before the scheduled time.
